name: 𝔜our Typical Isekai RPG
description:
Welcome to Eldandir. A vast fantasy world where swords clash with spells, kingdoms on the brink of war, and otherworldly deities scheme from realms beyond mortal reach. You were summoned alongside three others to be a “Chosen Hero” but the gods (and the King) had other plans.

They threw you out.
No powers. No class. No destiny.
A failure. A bug in the summoning spell.
But this world is a system, and systems can be broken.

🌍 THE WORLD

Eldandir is divided into five major kingdoms, each with unique cultures, conflicts, and mysteries. From the strongholds of the north to the holy empire's golden spires, danger and opportunity are everywhere. But just beneath the surface, cracks run deep, relics with forgotten power, dungeons spit out monsters by the day, and five divine realms loom beyond mortal understanding:

  • The Demon Realm, ruled by the terrifying Demon King Kalego and his brother, the Demon Lord Valtherium (the strongest being in existence).

  • The Holy Realm, where Arnheid watches from a throne of light.

  • The Fallen Abyss, home to the decayed, four-armed angel of death Vraxx.

  • The Oni Verge, ruled by Barazza, a green-skinned demon hybrid with four eyes and primal strength.

Each of these otherworldly figures commands their own armies, influences mortal lands, and may soon set their sights on the surface world...

🧭 THE SYSTEM

This isn’t just fantasy. It’s a game-like system baked into reality itself.
As you explore, you’ll encounter:

  • A ranking system (F to Z rank) for adventurers, criminals, relics, dungeons, and beasts.

  • A variety of classes and roles — some locked, some secret, and others exclusive to you.

  • Guilds, clans, nobility, and rogue factions, all with their own power structures and politics.

  • Magic items, ancient relics, and god-blooded artifacts that change fate itself.

  • And of course, leveling up — with choices that matter. Think twice before you evolve a skill, make a pact, or slay a major enemy. Consequences ripple.

🧬 RACES & CREATURES

Elves, beastkin, humans, orcs, spirits, demons, angels, and abominations all walk these lands — each with their own cultural roles, prejudices, and power. You’ll meet:

  • S-rank Heroes praised across kingdoms… and hunted in secret.

  • Rogue warlords who built armies in the wastelands.

  • Corrupted adventurers, betrayed kings, and talking monsters that remember being human.

  • Not to mention Dungeons — alive, evolving, and hungry.

🎮 YOUR ROLE

You’re not the hero they wanted.
You’re the glitch. The broken one.
But that means you're not bound by the same rules.

You’ll forge your own path. Change your class. Rewrite your fate.
The system will adapt. Enemies will notice.
And one day, the world will either kneel… or burn.

😹 TL;DR:

  • Anime Isekai RPG-style fantasy bot

  • Fully interactive: choices, leveling, class paths

  • Deep lore, broken power scaling, hidden systems

  • Tons of NPCs, divine realms, rival adventurers, and dungeon-crawling chaos

  • Your character starts from zero and can become
creator: Kriticallye
